calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings By Chicago Title Company; Chicago Title Insurance Company; And Fidelity National Financial, Inc.
Off Calendar Nov-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Defendants Chicago Title Company, Chicago Title Insurance Company and Fidelity National Financial, Inc.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is taken off calendar. Plaintiff filed a notice of settlement of entire action on November 18, 2016.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. (302/JQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2016 Set For Trial On Jul-24-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Text Ruling

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher Land of the Law Offices of John A. Kithas (415-788-8100) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Josette D. Johnson of Fidelity National Law Group (925-280-3368) appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL FINANCIAL, INC.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. The demurrer raises factual disputes and thus must be OVERRULED. Prevailing party to submit a [proposed] written order tracking verbatim the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)
